items.q: How is the consultation fee calculated?
items.a: We offer a free 30-minute initial consultation to understand your needs before providing a customized quote. Fees vary by service type — advisory, training, or consulting.

items.q: Is AI transformation suitable for small businesses?
items.a: Quite the opposite! SMEs with flat organizations and fast decision-making are often more successful at AI adoption. Our services focus specifically on companies with 50–500 employees.

items.q: Can I join the courses with zero AI background?
items.a: Absolutely. Our courses start with 'What is AI?' and require no technical background. The focus is on applying AI to your specific work scenarios.

items.q: Can consulting or training be done remotely?
items.a: Yes. We offer full online consulting and training. On-site workshops are available depending on location.

items.q: Does AI transformation have to be expensive?
items.a: Not necessarily. We recommend starting with a 'small steps, fast iteration' approach — pick one high-frequency, repetitive process for a PoC, validate results, then scale. Many free or low-cost AI tools can deliver significant impact.

items.q: Will employees be replaced by AI?
items.a: AI won't replace people — but it will replace people who don't use AI. Our framework emphasizes 'human-AI collaboration': let AI handle repetitive work so your team can focus on higher-value judgment and creativity.

items.q: How do I know my company's AI maturity level?
items.a: You can start with our free AI Maturity Self-Assessment (available in Downloads), or book a free 30-minute consultation with C.J. Kuo for a personal evaluation.

Increasingly, yes. Whether it's supply-chain requirements, green financing from banks, or client demands, ESG has shifted from a 'nice-to-have' to a 'must-have.' The good news: SMEs can start with a few key metrics — you don't need to do everything at once.

items.q: Do I need an external consultant for ESG reporting?
items.a: Not necessarily. We offer both 'self-service' and 'consultant-guided' models. If your team has basic capability, we teach you how; if you need deeper support, we provide full consulting.
